Domestic Box Office $82,280,579Details
International Box Office $112,800,000
Worldwide Box Office $195,080,579
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $36,829,869
Total $36,829,869

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$27,515,871 (33.4% of total gross)
Legs:2.99 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:42.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$150,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,153 opening theaters/3,249 max. theaters, 4.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $142,956,146

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 16th, 2007 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
November 16th, 2007 (IMAX) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: November 29th, 2007 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: February 26th, 2008 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of violence including disturbing images, some sexual material and nudity
Running Time: 115 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Motion Capture Performance
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D, IMAX: DMR

Social setting: Sword & Sorcerer
Subgenre: Heroic Adventure

Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Fantasy
Production/Financing Companies: Paramount Pictures, Shangri-La Entertainment, ImageMovers
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
